channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Chip firm ASML to slash 1,700 jobs and posts record profit for 2025 thanks to AI boom
item.description: Dutch semiconductor chip machine maker ASML recorded a record net profit of 9.6 billion euros ($11.5 billion) in 2025 on sales of 32.7 billion euros fueled by AI-driven demand, the company reported Wednesday as it also announced plans to slash its workforce by about 1,700, about 4% of its workforce.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft beats Wall Street expectations with $81.3B revenue
item.description: Microsoft reports revenue of $81.3 billion for the October-December quarter, marking a 17% increase from the previous year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Does Wonder Man directly set up a major storyline in Spider-Man: Brand New Day? The Marvel TV show's head writer has his say
item.description: Wonder Man's showrunner stopped short of confirming if the new Disney+ show will impact Spider-Man 4's story.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: Spanish soccer league offers reward of 50 euros for tips to ID bars illegally broadcasting games
item.description: The Spanish league says it is stepping up its fight against audio-visual fraud by offering 50 euros for each verified tip on the establishments broadcasting games without proper permission.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mplify launches AI-focused Carrier Ethernet certifications
item.description: The Carrier Ethernet market is undergoing a significant shift as AI workloads demand new performance validation from network infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon confirms 16,000 job cuts, including to AWS
item.description: Amazon is cutting about 16,000 jobs across the company, SVP of People Experience and Technology Beth Galetti wrote in an email to employees Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Wonder Man ending explained: what happens to Simon and Trevor, is there a post-credits scene, and more on the new Marvel TV show's finale
item.description: Want to know what the future might hold for Simon Williams and Trevor Slattery in the MCU? TechRadar has got you covered.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: In Davos, warnings about AI and jobs
item.description: The impact of AI on the labor market is more serious than previously expected, with entry-level jobs collapsing and white-collar jobs in danger, participants at the World Economic Forum (WEF) said last week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: AMD news and insights | Nvidia news and insights Intel is hoping for a turnaround under its new CEO, Lip-BuTan. Intel’s Q1 2025 revenue was $12.7 billion, flat year-over-year.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Stop treating force multiplication as a side gig. Make it intentional
item.description: Most engineers have heard the phrase “10x engineer” or “force multiplier“. In practice, the highest leverage is not solo heroics but whether your presence makes everyone around you faster, safer and more effective. That is force multiplication.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google Fast Pair flaw lets hackers hijack headphones
item.description: Google responds to WhisperPair Fast Pair security flaws by releasing patches to manufacturers and updating certification requirements for protection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Smart pill confirms when medication is swallowed
item.description: MIT engineers design smart pill that confirms medication ingestion using biodegradable antenna technology. The pill safely breaks down in stomach within days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI can improve federal service delivery, citizen survey says
item.description: The results of a survey by the Center for Accountability, Modernization and Innovation (CAMI) gives federal executives ideas for improving service delivery. The post AI can improve federal service delivery, citizen survey says first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Amazon layoffs expected to disproportionately hit AWS and tech talent
item.description: As the market slows down, AWS and other Amazon units are preparing for another round of layoffs, which is expected to overwhelmingly impact tech talent. “Amazon is planning a second round of job cuts next week as part of its broader goal of trimming some 30,000 corporate workers,” Reuters reported.
item.dc:creator: Network World
